content: The intrinsic curiosity drive of ICM-equipped autonomous agents can be repurposed to actively curate the long-term memory of state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents, automatically prioritizing encoding unexpected, high-learning-gain experiences over redundant, low-value ones that bloat working memory. This memory curation mechanism replaces static fixed-capacity retention rules with a dynamic, self-regulated system aligned to the agent’s ongoing learning goals.
